rows.label: qev085909_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome to Army Pizza! Are
you here to buy a pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085909_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Eh? You want ten pizzas delivered?
Then for 10,000G, we'll deliver our
piping hot pizzas anywhere you need them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085909_JNK0010
rows.name: Buy

rows.label: qev085909_SEL0011
rows.name: Purchase the pizzas for 10,000G.

rows.label: qev085909_JNK0020
rows.name: Don't buy

rows.label: qev085909_SEL0021
rows.name: Decline, saying you will pass.

rows.label: qev085909_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thank you for your patronage! So
we just need to deliver the pizzas
to Jeshero-san's place, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085909_MSG0009
rows.name:
We'll get them delivered right away
via super-express, so leave it to us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085909_MSG0004
rows.name:
Okay, make sure to use us again,
alright? We'll deliver piping
hot pizzas any time of day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085909_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Wait, huh? Are you
perhaps short on funds?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085909_MSG0012
rows.name:
Sorry about that. Our motto
is cash payments only.[ST:wait ]
